title: SigmaAldrichProduct
description: Represents a research chemical, biochemical, or laboratory supply in the Sigma-Aldrich product catalog.

catalogNumber.description: Sigma-Aldrich catalog number uniquely identifying this product

description.description: Product description including key applications and specifications

brand.description: Sigma-Aldrich brand under which this product is sold

formula.description: Molecular formula using Hill notation (e.g., C2H6O for ethanol)

smiles.description: Simplified Molecular Input Line Entry System (SMILES) notation

inchiKey.description: Hashed InChI key for chemical structure identification

grade.description: Product grade designation (e.g., ACS reagent, BioReagent, HPLC Plus, ReagentPlus)

synonyms.description: Alternative names, IUPAC names, and common names for the product

physicalState.description: Physical state at standard conditions (25°C, 1 atm)

packagingOptions.description: Available package sizes and container types

packagingType.description: Container type (e.g., glass bottle, ampule, vial, drum)
